subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Almighty! Thy gracious letter hath been received, and from its contents spirit and fragrance were derived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق حضرت کبریا رقیمه کریمه وصول یافت و از مضامین روح و ریحان حصول
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for forgiveness, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
